title: Land where your category lives
intro: Buyers don't source from companies; they source for categories. Each market page brings together the capabilities, facilities, certifications and proof relevant to one category.

items.title: Toys & Games
items.body: Toy production and toy packaging at PT Printec Perkasa II, supported by in-house ISO 17025 heavy-metal and phthalate testing and decades of programmes for the world's leading toy brands — including doll clothing, playsets and licensed packaging.
items.proof: Long-term programmes with global toy leaders including Mattel, Hasbro, Spin Master, Funko, Bandai Namco and MGA.

items.title: Greeting Cards & Stationery
items.body: High-volume offset and rotogravure programmes for cards, stationery and paper goods, run inside US retail seasonal calendars with GMI-certified colour control.
items.proof: Decades of continuous supply to Hallmark, American Greetings and US mass retail.

items.title: Gifting & Seasonal
items.body: Gift wrap, rollwrap, gift bags and tags, rigid and suitcase boxes, tissue and party items across dedicated facilities in Java and Foshan — engineered for seasonal peaks and store-ready presentation.
items.proof: Gift-bag programmes with a minimum of 95% recycled paper content.

items.title: Home & Lifestyle
items.body: Woven baskets, ornaments and home accents from natural and recycled materials, produced with rural artisan communities under the NEST handworker standard and our FSC-certified rattan supply chain.
items.proof: FSC rattan supply chain operational since 2024, in partnership with Target under NEST.

items.title: FMCG & Retail Packaging
items.body: Folding cartons and retail packaging for food, beverage, pharma and consumer brands across Indonesia and the region, with FSSC 22000 food-safety certification and GMI colour governance.
items.proof: Trusted by Danone, Glico, Fonterra, Otsuka, Kalbe, Godrej and Indonesia's leading consumer brands.
